title: Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper (Xero · AU Businesses)
description:
NOTE: Applicants who followed instructions will be contacted right away. We are hiring immediately.



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-time

Working Hours: 8:00am – 4:00pm Philippine Time (Monday–Friday)



About the Role

We’re looking for a Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper with deep, hands-on Xero experience and proven experience supporting Australian e-commerce businesses.



This is not a general bookkeeping role. You will be responsible for accurate e-commerce financials, management reporting, and cashflow forecasting that give clear visibility over performance and cash position in a fast-moving online business.



Key Responsibilities (E-commerce Focused)



1. End-to-end bookkeeping in Xero for an Australian e-commerce business



2. Reconciliation of:

- Bank accounts & credit cards

- Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal, Afterpay and similar gateways



3. Accurate handling of:

- Online sales, refunds & chargebacks

- Platform, merchant & transaction fees

- Advertising spend (Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.)



4. Inventory and COGS tracking, including landed costs



5. Preparation of monthly management reporting:

- Profit & Loss

- Balance Sheet

- Cashflow statements



6. Build and maintain rolling cashflow forecasts



7. Assist with Australian BAS & GST reporting in coordination with external accountants



8. Maintain clean financial data across multiple entities and currencies where required



9. Proactively identify reporting issues, discrepancies, or cashflow risks



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

- Extensive hands-on experience with Xero

- Proven experience working with Australian e-commerce businesses



Strong understanding of:

- Shopify accounting workflows

- Payment gateway reconciliations

- Inventory accounting for e-commerce



Demonstrated experience creating:

- Management P&Ls

- Cashflow forecasts



Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Nice to Have

- Experience with multi-store or multi-brand e-commerce businesses

- Experience supporting fast-growth online brands

- Comfortable working directly with founders or senior management



Mandatory Application Task (Required to Apply)

To apply for this role, you must complete the Excel task below.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Excel Task (30–45 minutes)



Create one Excel file with two tabs:



Tab 1 – E-commerce P&L Layout

Design a monthly Profit & Loss layout suitable for an Australian e-commerce business.

Your layout should clearly show:

Revenue (gross sales)

Cost of Goods Sold (including inventory & landed costs)

Gross Profit

Operating Expenses (advertising, platform fees, freight, overheads)

Net Profit



Tab 2 – Cashflow Forecast Layout

Design a rolling 3-month cashflow forecast layout that includes:

Opening cash balance

Cash inflows from sales

Cash outflows (inventory purchases, ad spend, operating costs, GST)

Closing cash balance per month



Notes:

You do not need to include real numbers

Structure, logic, and clarity matter more than formatting

Include formulas where appropriate



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Your Excel file (2 tabs as outlined above)



Applications missing the Excel file will not be considered.

8. Maintain clean financial data across multiple entities and currencies where required



9. Proactively identify reporting issues, discrepancies, or cashflow risks



10. Manage 12 Shopify Accounts



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

- Extensive hands-on experience with Xero

- Proven experience working with Australian e-commerce businesses



Strong understanding of:

- Shopify accounting workflows

- Payment gateway reconciliations

- Inventory accounting for e-commerce



Demonstrated experience creating:

- Management P&Ls

- Cashflow forecasts



Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Nice to Have

- Experience with multi-store or multi-brand e-commerce businesses 

- Experience supporting fast-growth online brands

- Comfortable working directly with founders or senior management



Mandatory Application Task (Required to Apply)

To apply for this role, you must complete the Excel task below.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Excel Task (30–45 minutes)



Create one Excel file with two tabs:



Tab 1 – E-commerce P&L Layout

Design a monthly Profit & Loss layout suitable for an Australian e-commerce business.

Your layout should clearly show:

Revenue (gross sales)

Cost of Goods Sold (including inventory & landed costs)

Gross Profit

Operating Expenses (advertising, platform fees, freight, overheads)

Net Profit



Tab 2 – Cashflow Forecast Layout

Design a rolling 3-month cashflow forecast layout that includes:

Opening cash balance

Cash inflows from sales

Cash outflows (inventory purchases, ad spend, operating costs, GST)

Closing cash balance per month



Notes:

You do not need to include real numbers

Structure, logic, and clarity matter more than formatting

Include simple formulas where appropriate



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Your Excel file (2 tabs as outlined above)



Applications missing the Excel file will not be considered.



What We Offer: 

- Fully remote role | Stable working hours (8:00am – 4:00pm PH time)

- Long-term opportunity with a growing e-commerce business

- High level of trust, autonomy, and ownership

Thanks

title: Payroll/Bookkeeper - Experienced (AU)
description:
About Us

Deryan Financial Group is a family-owned accounting and finance firm with over 40 years of experience helping clients make smarter financial and lending decisions.

We combine the expertise of mortgage broking and accounting to deliver end-to-end solutions — from securing the right loan to optimising tax and business outcomes.



The Opportunity

If you’re an experienced Bookkeeper who takes pride in accuracy, organisation, and compliance — this is your opportunity to take ownership of client books and lead the payroll function within our growing accounting division.



You’ll manage day-to-day bookkeeping across multiple clients, ensure payrolls are processed correctly and on time, and maintain compliance with current Fair Work and ATO requirements. You’ll work closely with our accountants, keeping client files accurate and complete so the tax team can focus on advisory and strategy.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys autonomy, thrives on structure and precision, and is confident in managing payroll and bookkeeping from end to end.



What You’ll Do

Manage bookkeeping for a portfolio of business clients across multiple industries.



Payroll processing, ensuring accuracy in pay runs, superannuation, PAYG, and leave entitlements.



Prepare and lodge BAS, IAS, STP, and superannuation contributions.



Perform bank reconciliations, transaction allocations, and maintain accurate financial records.



Communicate directly with clients regarding payroll changes, compliance issues, and outstanding queries.



Collaborate with the tax team to finalise year-end accounts and reports.



Identify and implement process improvements to streamline bookkeeping and payroll systems.



About You

3+ years’ experience in bookkeeping, payroll, or client accounting (essential).



Proven experience with Xero Payroll and related add-ons (e.g. Deputy, Employment Hero, KeyPay).



Experience with all compliance lodgements for the Australian Taxation System including BAS and IAS



Experience with all superannuation reporting including exposure to multiple clearing houses.



Experience with Payroll tax for reconciliation of Payroll, Preparation and submission of payroll tax returns.



Confident interpreting awards and ensuring compliance with Fair Work standards.



Experience with the uploading of AR and AP including manual and auto integration of data from multiple software packages including Restoke/ Hubdoc etc.



Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.



Professional communication skills and ability to manage client relationships independently.



Organized, reliable, and proactive in identifying issues before they arise.



What’s on Offer



Competitive salary based on experience.



Supportive, professional, and family-oriented team culture.



Opportunity to lead the bookkeeping and payroll function within the firm.



Exposure to a wide range of clients, industries, and accounting systems.



How to Apply



Submit your resume and a brief statement of interest to [wendy@deryan.com.au

] with the subject line: Bookkeeper/Payroll – [Your Name].

title: Automation Specialist (Make / HubSpot / ClickUp / AI Workflows)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Automation Specialist to build and optimise workflows across our tech stack, primarily using Make (Integromat), HubSpot, ClickUp, and Google Workspace. This is an initial project-based role, with strong potential for ongoing work.



About the Role



Your first task will be to build a fully functional, end-to-end automation workflow that connects:



- HubSpot (CRM)

- ClickUp (Project Management)

- Google Forms & Google Sheets

-
 automation (or similar)



This workflow will support our job onboarding process after a deal is won.



Initial Project Scope



You will build a system that:



- Triggers from HubSpot

- When a deal is marked as won and moved to “In Production”

- Creates / updates a ClickUp task In the correct list

- Writes the ClickUp Task ID back to HubSpot

- Ensures no duplicate tasks are created

- Pre-fills a Google Form

- Using HubSpot deal data

- Ideally extracting useful information from deal activity (notes/emails)

- Sends the form to the client

- Automatically 
 or similar)

- Captures client responses

- Via Google Forms ? Google Sheets

- Pushes data back into systems

- Updates specific fields in HubSpot

- Updates the existing ClickUp task (not creating a new one)

- Finalises the job setup

- Populates ClickUp task fields as a job sheet

- Assigns the task to the correct project manager

- Sends confirmation

- Automated response to client after form submission



Key Requirements



You must have proven experience with:



- Make (Integromat) – complex multi-step scenarios

- HubSpot CRM – deals, properties, automation

- ClickUp – task creation, custom fields, API/integrations

- Google Forms & Google Sheets

- API integrations and data mapping between systems

- Bonus Skills (Highly Valued)

- Experience using AI tools to:

- Extract insights from CRM data

- Automate lead qualification

- Generate outreach workflows



Experience with:



- Slack integrations

-
 automation systems

- Data cleaning / enrichment workflows



Important



This is not a basic task automation role.



We need someone who can:



- Design clean, reliable systems

- Avoid duplication and logic errors

- Troubleshoot and fix broken workflows

- Think proactively about better ways to structure automation



Future Work



If this project is successful, there is ongoing work including:



- AI-driven outbound campaigns using HubSpot data

- Lead qualification automation

- Improving workflows between HubSpot and ClickUp

- Building additional internal automation systems



To Apply



Please include:



Examples of similar automation systems you’ve built

Tools you’ve used (Make, Zapier, APIs, etc.)

A brief explanation of how you would approach this project

s from templates (reviewed by founder before sending during first 60 days)

Work without clear SOPs



You're the execution engine. Process is documented. AI drafts responses. You follow the workflow.

Stable work history (2+ years at previous roles preferred)

Experience in customer service, content moderation, or VA roles



Compensation



Starting at $
/month depending on experience

Salary review at 90 days based on performance



Start

Hiring and starting within 2 weeks.



How to Apply:

1. Written introduction (
words)

Current availability and earliest possible start date

Say the word "FLAGSHIP" clearly at some point in the video

Link to the video in your application

 or speedtest.net)

We respond to all complete applications within 5 business days.

title: SEO Specialist (WordPress + Local SEO) for Houston Delivery Business

If you cannot show real results, do not apply.

Do keyword research focused on Houston search intent

Build or recommend new pages (service + location pages)

Optimize for Google search and maps visibility

Work inside WordPress + RankMath

Track rankings, traffic, and conversions

Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

Experience with local SEO

Experience with WordPress + RankMath

Must understand how to drive customers, not just impressions

title: Creative & Website Assistant
description:
Position Overview



Phoenix Performance Solutions is looking for a creative, reliable, and tech-savvy Creative & Website Assistant to help support our growing brand across sports, supplements, apparel, events, and marketing. This person will play an important role in helping us create strong visuals, maintain and improve website content, and use modern tools, including AI, to work faster and smarter.



This is a great opportunity for someone who is naturally creative, enjoys design and digital tools, can follow brand direction well, and wants to grow with a company over time. We are not just looking for someone to complete random tasks. We want someone who can help us consistently make Phoenix look more professional, more engaging, and more organized across our marketing and web presence.



This role is best suited for someone who is strong in visual creativity first, but also comfortable helping with basic website work and AI-supported content creation.



Main Role Focus



This role is primarily focused on the following areas:



1. Creative Design Support



The main responsibility of this role is creating graphics and visual materials that help Phoenix market its products, services, leagues, tournaments, and promotions more effectively. This includes:



Flyers

Promotional graphics

Social media visuals

Product images

Website banners

Event graphics

Sales graphics

Simple branded marketing materials



The person in this role should be able to take an idea, message, or rough direction and turn it into a polished visual that looks clean, professional, and engaging.



2. Website Content & Visual Updates



This role will also support the website by helping update content and visuals inside WordPress and Elementor. This may include:



Updating landing pages

Swapping images

Adding banners or graphics

Updating product page visuals

Making simple layout adjustments

Uploading new promotional sections

Helping keep pages visually consistent and current



This is not intended to be a heavy coding or advanced developer role. It is more about maintaining and improving the website from a creative and content standpoint.



3. AI-Assisted Creative and Workflow Support



We want someone who is comfortable learning and using AI tools to improve speed, quality, and efficiency. This may include:



Using AI to brainstorm creative ideas

Assisting with basic copy drafts

Creating or refining image concepts

Generating variations of ads or promotional ideas

Using AI tools to improve workflow and productivity



We are especially interested in someone who is curious, adaptable, and open to using modern tools to get better results faster.



Detailed Responsibilities



The Creative & Website Assistant may be responsible for tasks such as:



Designing digital flyers for leagues, events, product offers, and promotions

Creating graphics for social media posts, stories, ads, and announcements

Designing banners and promotional images for the Phoenix website

Helping create product visuals for supplements, apparel, or team gear

Updating website pages using WordPress and Elementor

Uploading and formatting graphics and content on the website

Creating visual templates that can be reused for future promotions

Resizing designs for different platforms and uses

Assisting with sponsor graphics, information sheets, and simple branded materials

Organizing brand assets, files, and design folders

Using AI tools to support design, creative ideation, and productivity

Helping Phoenix maintain a stronger and more consistent overall brand presence

What Success in This Role Looks Like



Success in this role is not just about making nice-looking graphics. It is about helping Phoenix become more consistent, more efficient, and more professional in how it presents itself.



A successful person in this role will:



In the First 30 Days

Learn the Phoenix brand, style, and priorities

Show they can follow instructions and complete tasks on time

Create clean, usable graphics with minimal hand-holding

Demonstrate basic confidence with WordPress and Elementor updates

Communicate clearly and respond reliably

Show willingness to learn and improve quickly

In the First 60 to 90 Days

Begin creating stronger graphics with less revision needed

Help improve the visual quality and consistency of Phoenix marketing materials

Become dependable for recurring design and website tasks

Start suggesting helpful creative ideas instead of only waiting for instructions

Use AI tools effectively to increase output and speed

Help reduce the amount of time the founder spends fixing graphics or basic website issues

Long-Term Success

Phoenix has a cleaner, more professional visual brand across its website and marketing

Promotions, flyers, and graphics are created faster and at a higher quality

Website pages stay current and visually appealing

The person becomes a trusted creative support asset to the company

They grow into taking more ownership of design and visual content over time



A great hire in this role will make it easier for Phoenix to market consistently without everything depending on the founder to create, revise, or manage every visual asset personally.



Ideal Skills to Have



These are the skills and qualities that would make someone especially valuable in this role.



Design Skills

Strong eye for layout, spacing, and visual balance

Ability to create engaging flyers, graphics, and marketing visuals

Experience with Canva, Adobe Express, Photoshop, or similar tools

Ability to maintain a clean and professional style

Understanding of how to make content visually appealing without making it cluttered

Website Skills

Basic experience with WordPress

Basic experience with Elementor

Confidence updating website pages, images, and simple content sections

Ability to keep pages organized and visually clean

Familiarity with WooCommerce is a plus

AI & Tech Skills

Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT or image-generation tools

Ability to use AI to improve speed, idea generation, and workflow

General comfort with digital tools and learning new platforms

Strong tech adaptability

Communication & Work Style

Good written English

Able to follow instructions carefully

Responsive and dependable

Organized with files and task management

Open to feedback and able to apply revisions well

Self-motivated and willing to learn

Bonus Experience



These are not required, but would be a strong plus:



Experience working with sports, fitness, supplements, apparel, or ecommerce brands

Basic video editing ability

Experience creating ad creatives

Experience with product page images or promotional layouts

Experience supporting a small business founder or startup team

Familiarity with social media content creation

Who This Role Is Best For



This role is ideal for someone who:



Is naturally creative

Likes making things look better and more professional

Enjoys using design tools and digital platforms

Wants to grow with a company

Is comfortable wearing a few related hats within a creative-focused position

Can balance creativity with structure and follow-through

Who This Role Is Not For



This role is probably not the best fit for someone who:



Only wants to do admin work

Has no interest in design or visual content

Is not comfortable learning new tools

Needs constant supervision for every task

Has no interest in WordPress or website support

Wants a highly specialized senior designer or developer role

Performance Expectations



The person in this role should be able to:



Meet deadlines consistently

Produce quality work without excessive revision

Communicate clearly about progress and blockers

Take feedback professionally

Improve over time

Help Phoenix move faster by reducing delays in creative and website-related work



Work Samples Required

To be considered for this role, applicants should submit examples of their previous work. We would like to see samples that demonstrate their creativity, design ability, and overall quality of work. These can include flyers, promotional graphics, website visuals, social media graphics, landing pages, or other relevant creative projects. If they have experience with WordPress or Elementor, examples of pages they have worked on are a strong plus. If they have used AI tools in their workflow, we would also like a brief note explaining which tools they used and how they used them.

title: Ad Launcher
description:
Hello Future Employee,

Who are we?

We are a fast-growing e-commerce company operating Shopify brand stores across Europe, generating consistent 6-figure monthly revenue. We specialize in emotionally-driven direct response advertising.

We are hiring a part-time Meta Ads Launcher to handle our daily ad launching operations. The right candidate will be meticulous, process-driven, and comfortable launching ads daily through incognito browser sessions across multiple ad accounts. You will be trained directly by the founder on our proven launching systems.

Responsibilities:



Launch Meta 
/Instagram) ads daily across multiple ad accounts

Operate exclusively through incognito browser sessions for every launch (non-negotiable workflow)

Follow exact naming conventions, campaign structures, and launch SOPs

Upload creatives, set targeting, budgets, and placements per brief

Duplicate winning campaigns and scale per daily instructions

Track launched campaigns in our reporting system

Flag any ad account issues, rejections, or policy warnings immediately

Stay on top of daily launch deadlines — consistency matters more than speed



You are the perfect fit if you have these qualities:



Experience launching Meta ads (Business Manager, Ads Manager) at scale

Comfortable working across multiple ad accounts and incognito sessions daily

Detail-oriented — you don't miss a UTM, a budget typo, or a wrong placement

Process-driven and able to follow specific SOPs without shortcuts

Reliable and punctual — daily launches can't be skipped

Fast learner, coachable, and responsive to feedback

Experience with dropshipping or direct response brands is a significant bonus



To apply, please include:



Your experience launching Meta ads (how many accounts, what scale)

Your familiarity with incognito/multi-account workflows

A brief note on your availability (hours/day, timezone)

Any SOPs or launch frameworks you've worked with previously



What we offer:



100% remote work setup

Part-time role with a starting salary based on experience and performance-based growth opportunities

Direct training and mentorship from the founder

A creative, fast-paced environment with real ownership of launches

Long-term growth potential as the team scales



If you are reliable, detail-oriented, and excited to own our daily ad launching operation, we'd love to hear from you. To confirm you've read the entire post, please include "COF" in your application.

Best Regards,

ASG

title: Media Buyer — Meta Ads for Established Local Lead Gen Agency (Full-Time, Room To Grow)
description:
We're hiring a full-time Media Buyer to manage 
 ad campaigns for our martial arts marketing agency.



We work exclusively with martial arts schools across the US (Karate, Taekwondo, BJJ, Boxing, Krav Maga) — running paid ads that generate student trial appointments. We currently manage 20+ client ad accounts spending a combined $30,000-$50,000/month on Meta ads, and we're scaling.



This is not a freelance gig. This is a full-time role (40 hrs/week) with a base salary, performance bonuses tied to cost-per-lead, and real room to grow as we scale toward 40+ clients.



APPLY HERE: 



???? WHAT YOU'LL DO:

• Set up new client ad campaigns from scratch (we provide proven templates and creatives)

• Connect lead forms to GoHighLevel (SOPs provided)

• Split test ad sets, creatives, copy, and headlines across 20-40+ campaigns

• Optimize campaigns daily — monitor CPL, CTR, CPC, and booking metrics

• Flag underperforming clients and bring solutions (not just problems)

• Communicate wins, changes, and updates to clients proactively

• Attend weekly tea
etings and bring new ideas

• Report on campaign performance using Google Sheets dashboards



???? REQUIREMENTS:

• 2+ years managing
/Meta ad campaigns (lead generation, NOT ecommerce)

• Experience with GoHighLevel (connecting lead forms, pixels, tracking)

• Comfortable with Google Sheets (updating KPI trackers, dashboards)

• Clear English communication (written + verbal)

• Reliable internet + laptop/computer

• Available for full-time hours (this is NOT a side gig — we need your full attention)

• Based in the Philippines (preferred for timezone alignment)



???? NICE TO HAVE:

• Experience running ads for local service businesses (gyms, martial arts, fitness, dental, etc.)

• Familiarity with Slack (our team communication tool)

• Experience creating ad creatives (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)

• Prior agency experience managing multiple client accounts simultaneously



???? COMPENSATION:

• $800 - $1,000 USD/month base (depending on experience)

• Monthly CPL performance bonus:

  — Sub $10 average CPL across your accounts: $400 bonus

  — $10-$12 average CPL: $200 bonus

  — $13-$14 average CPL: $100 bonus

• Additional churn bonus for client retention

• Room to grow into a senior role as we scale



???? WHAT YOU'RE WALKING INTO:

• Ad creatives and copy are provided — you don't need to be a designer

• SOPs for every process — campaign setup, optimization, reporting

• A small, tight team that actually cares about results and culture

• Weekly tea
etings with roleplay, training, and coaching

• Direct access to the CEO for strategy and feedback



???? HOW TO APPLY:

1. Fill out our application form: 

2. Include the number '88' somewhere in your application so we know you read this

3. Top candidates will be invited to a screening interview followed by a paid test project



We review applications within 48 hours.



If you're a media buyer who wants to own a roster of clients, get paid more when you perform, and grow with a company that's scaling fast — apply now.

title: Customs Entry Specialist
description:
Job Summary



We are seeking a detail-oriented Customs Entry Specialist with hands-on experience in CargoWise to manage accurate and timely customs filings for imports and exports. The ideal candidate will ensure compliance with HMRC regulations, coordinate with clients and customs officials, and maintain meticulous records of all entries and communications. This role is ideal for professionals who thrive in a remote work environment and have a strong focus on accuracy and regulatory compliance.



Key Responsibilities



Prepare and lodge UK import/export customs entries using CargoWise, with complete accuracy and within deadlines.

Ensure all documentation and filings meet HMRC compliance standards and regulatory requirements.

Verify tariff classifications (HS codes) and calculate correct duties/VAT for shipments.

Coordinate with clients and customs officials to obtain information and resolve any entry issues.

Maintain detailed records of declarations and communications for audit and tracking.



Qualifications



2+ years of experience in customs entry or brokerage, specifically handling UK imports & exports.

Proficiency in CargoWise customs modules

In-depth knowledge of UK customs regulations, import/export procedures, and relevant documentation

Excellent English communication skills and meticulous attention to detail in data entry and document review

Ability to work remotely with strong self-discipline, time management, and collaborative skills.



What We Offer



Hybrid in Cebu (twice a month)/ Work-from-home flexibility | Full-time

20,000 – 30,000 monthly

Opportunity to work with a collaborative and professional logistics team

Complete the Form –

 Your Resume –

description:
Overview:

We are seeking a skilled and experienced Scholarship Essay Writer to help students craft compelling, authentic, and competitive scholarship essays. This role is ideal for individuals with a strong academic background in English or proven experience with scholarships.



Key Responsibilities:

Write and edit high-quality scholarship essays tailored to specific prompts

Translate student experiences into clear, compelling, and persuasive narratives

Ensure all essays meet scholarship guidelines, tone expectations, and word limits

Provide revisions and strategic feedback to improve essay strength

Maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times

Qualifications (Required):

Strong academic performance in English, Writing, or a related field (recommended GPA: 3.5+)

Exceptional writing, grammar, and editing skills

Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple assignments

Preferred Experience (At Least One):

Has won scholarships and understands what makes an essay stand out

Has served on a scholarship selection committee or reviewed applications

Has helped others successfully win scholarships

Experience in college admissions or academic writing

Key Traits We’re Looking For:

Strong storyteller with attention to detail

Ability to write in an authentic, student-centered voice

Organized, responsive, and deadline-driven

Passionate about helping students access opportunities

Compensation:

Project-based pay (per essay or package)

Performance bonuses for high-quality work and successful outcomes



Why This Role Matters:



Your writing can directly impact whether a student receives funding for their education. You’re not just writing essays you’re helping open doors.

title: YouTube Shorts Scriptwriter (Long term role)
description:
???? Job Description

We are looking for a creative YouTube Shorts Scriptwriter to produce engaging, high-retention scripts for a growing YouTube automation channel in the dental health niche.

Our content will feature a skeleton avatar and follow a viral, attention-grabbing style similar to popular short-form channels — but focused specifically on teeth, hygiene, and dental care.



The goal is simple:

Grab attention FAST

Keep people watching until the end

Feel entertaining and easy to understand



???? What You’ll Be Doing

Write 30–60 second scripts for YouTube Shorts (3 scripts per week)

Create strong hooks within the first 1–3 seconds

Structure scripts for maximum retention and watch time

Simplify dental/health topics into entertaining, easy-to-understand content

Add curiosity, tension, and exaggeration to keep viewers engaged

Work closely with our content team to align scripts with viral ideas



?? Important – Content Style

This is NOT academic or clinical writing.

Our videos are designed for:

Short attention spans

Entertainment + education

High engagement + views



???? This means:

Some information may be simplified or slightly exaggerated for engagement

The focus is on viewer retention and virality, not perfect scientific depth

If you are someone who prefers strict, formal writing — this role is not for you.



???? Example Style

We are aiming for:

Fast-paced storytelling

Bold statements

Curiosity-driven hooks

Example:

? “Brushing your teeth twice a day is important.”

? “If you brush like THIS, you might be destroying your teeth…”



???? What We’re Looking For

Experience in YouTube Shorts, TikTok, or short-form scriptwriting

Strong understanding of:

Hooks

Retention

Viral content structure

Ability to write in a clear, engaging, conversational tone

Creative thinker and able to think of engaging angles + who can turn simple or complex topics into compelling scripts

Fast turnaround time

Interest in health, hygiene, or dental topics is a bonus



???? Content Details

Niche: Dental Health / Hygiene

Format: YouTube Shorts (30–60 seconds)

Style: Animated / Skelly (skeleton avatar)

Tone: Engaging, slightly exaggerated, curiosity-driven



???? Payment & Opportunity

Flat rate per script/video

Long-term opportunity if performance good

Potential to grow into a lead scriptwriter role as channels scale



???? REQUIRED – Application Task

To apply, please complete this task:

Write 1 short script (30–45 seconds) based on this idea:

“Why your breath still smells even after brushing”

Include:

A strong hook

Engaging flow

Ending that keeps retention high

Applications without this will be ignored.

Also provide any previous work and references.

title: AI Video Creator (Visual Generation for YouTube Shorts / No Editing Required)
description:
We are looking for an AI Video Creator to generate visual content for YouTube Shorts (30–60 seconds) in the dental health niche. Your role is to create the raw visuals/clips using AI tools — we will handle editing, voiceover, and final production. This is a simple, repeatable role focused only on generating engaging visual assets.



All videos must consistently feature a specific skeleton avatar (Skelly) throughout the entire video. This means:

The skeleton avatar should be present in most or all scenes

It should act as the main character/visual focus of the video

Visuals should be built around the avatar (not random clips)



The goal is to build a recognisable character and brand, so consistency is very important.



???? Responsibilities

Generate AI clips based on provided scripts

Create engaging scenes that match the topic (teeth, hygiene, etc.)

Deliver multiple short clips per VIDEO (NOT FULL EDITS)



Ensure visuals are:

Eye-catching

Relevant to the script

Varied (no repetition)

Organise and send files clearly



?? Important – What You DO NOT Need To Do

? No voiceovers

? No final editing

? No posting

???? We handle all of that.



Your job = visual generation only



???? Content Details

Niche: Dental Health

Format: YouTube Shorts

Length: 30–60 seconds

Style: AI-generated visuals (animated / realistic / engaging)

Goal: Create visuals that help keep viewers watching



???? Requirements

Experience using AI tools to generate video or images

Ability to follow a script and turn it into visual scenes

Creative eye for engaging visuals

Reliable and organised



When applying, you MUST include:

What AI tools/software you use (e.g. video generators, image generators, etc.)

Your workflow for creating visuals from a script



REQUIRED – Application

To apply, please send:



Previous work (AI-generated videos or visuals)

The AI tools you use

A short explanation of your workflow



Applications without examples will be ignored.



???? Payment

Flat rate per VIDEO (NOT per clip for each video)

Long-term opportunity if videos perform well.



???? Workload

Start with 3 videos per week

Potential to increase workload over time

title: Photography Editor Lightroom/Photoshot
description:
We are looking for a skilled Photography Editor with experience in Adobe Lightroom and Photoshop to edit and enhance images for various projects. The ideal candidate has a strong eye for detail, color correction, and visual storytelling.



Responsibilities include selecting, editing, and retouching photos to meet quality standards, adjusting lighting and color balance, removing imperfections, and ensuring consistency across all images. You will work with provided photo sets and deliver polished, high quality results in a timely manner.



Candidates should be proficient in Lightroom and Photoshop, have basic knowledge of photo composition, and be able to follow editing guidelines or presets when required. Creativity, reliability, and the ability to meet deadlines are essential.

title: Meta Ad Launcher (Part-time, Remote)
description:
About the role

We’re a fast-growing dropshipping brand in the health & beauty niche, launching new Meta campaigns every single day.

We’re looking for a Meta Ad Launcher: someone highly structured and reliable who can daily launch campaigns in Meta Ads Manager following a very specific workflow.

This is not a media buyer role and not a creative role.

Your responsibility is execution: making sure campaigns, ad sets, and ads are launched correctly, on time, and exactly as instructed.

You’ll work closely with our internal team and multiple creative creators to make sure everything goes live smoothly.

Working hours



2–3 hours per day

Preferred window: 20:00 – 23:30 Belgian time (CET/CEST)

This corresponds to 02:00 – 05:30 Philippine time (PHT)



What you’ll do



Launch Meta campaigns, ad sets, and ads daily based on clear instructions and predefined templates

Follow a strict and repeatable workflow (naming conventions, budgets, placements, statuses, tracking, etc.)

Upload and connect creatives provided by our creators

Double-check everything before launch (URLs, pixels, budgets, countries, status)

Communicate daily with our team and creators if something is missing or unclear

Report back once campaigns are successfully launched



What we’re looking for



Hands-on experience with Meta Ads Manager

You know where everything is and how to launch campaigns without guidance

Strong attention to detail

Small mistakes are costly — accuracy is critical

Process-driven mindset

You like following checklists and structured workflows

Clear communicator

You’re comfortable coordinating with different creators and tea
mbers

Reliable & consistent

You show up every day and launch on time





?? Important:

We are not looking for a media buyer, strategist, or someone to optimize campaigns.

This role is purely focused on launching and execution.



What we offer



100% remote work

Clear SOPs and workflows — no guessing

Stable daily work (2–3 hours/day) can be more in the future

Long-term collaboration if the fit is right

Competitive hourly rate based on experience

Work with a fast-scaling brand with multiple active products

title: Research Assistant for Educational Content Brand
description:
About us:

We are a growing educational brand creating high-quality learning tools designed to make complex topics simple, engaging, and easy to explore. Our products focus on clarity, accuracy, and thoughtful design.

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Research Assistant to help us gather, structure, and organize information for new products.



What you will do:

- Research topics using reliable sources and modern tools

- Collect and organize information into structured formats

- Summarize and refine information clearly and concisely

- Follow detailed instructions and maintain consistent formatting

- Review and verify information for accuracy and consistency

- Occasionally support related tasks such as content preparation and organizing materials for product development



Requirements:

- Clear written English

- High attention to detail (very important)

- Ability to follow structured instructions while thinking critically and improving results

- Strong research and problem-solving skills

- Organized, reliable, and able to work independently

- Comfortable learning and using new tools to improve efficiency



Nice to have:

- Experience with research or data organization

- Interest in science, education, or learning materials

- Experience working remotely



Role details:

- Full-time: 6–8 hours per day

- Long-term position

- Flexible working hours (with some overlap preferred)



Growth opportunity:

This is a long-term role. You will be involved in building new products from early stages and will have the opportunity to take on more responsibility over time, including contributing to different parts of the business.



How to apply:

Please include the word "Orion" at the top of your application and answer the following in 3–5 sentences:

Compare observing the Moon vs a distant galaxy through a small telescope. What are the key differences in visibility and detail?

title: IT & Infrastructure Specialist
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a sharp, self-directed IT specialist who can operate across multiple business units — the kind of person who owns problems fully, acts without being asked, and leaves systems better than they found them. Less help desk, more trusted technical operator.



What You'll Own

- I
 response — first on it, fast to diagnose, clear to communicate

- Servers, VMs, containers (Docker/LXC), networking, and Azure

- Software developer infrastructure — sessions, container health, and deployment pipelines

- Monitoring and alerting so we catch issues before users do

- Team tool support — permissions, integrations, configurations

- Identifying repetitive processes and getting them documented and automated



What We're Looking For

- Solid hands-on experience with Docker, Linux, and shell scripting

- Windows Server and Azure administration

- Knows the difference between a container that's running and services that are healthy

- Familiar with process managers (supervisord, PM2, systemd)

- Strong diagnostic instincts — asks before assuming, documents after fixing

- Clear communicator with non-technical stakeholders



How You Work: 

- You keep digging when you hit a wall — you try different angles before concluding something can't be done

- You don't wait for someone to follow up and ask why it's still not fixed

- You notice problems and act without being asked

- You treat blockers as puzzles, not reasons to stop



Nice to have: 

- CI/CD and automated deployments

- SQL Server, MySQL, or similar

- Monitoring tools (Grafana, UptimeRobot, PagerDuty)

- Familiarity with SOC 2 compliance requirements



How to apply: 

Kindly fill out below link to apply

title: B2B Content & Authority Lead
description:
B2B Content & Authority Lead

(UK Immigration | Compliance & Sponsor Licence Focus)



Immtell is a UK-based immigration consultancy specialising in:



• Sponsor licence applications 

• Sponsor licence compliance & mock audits 

• Skilled Worker visa strategy 

• UK business expansion support 



We are repositioning the business to focus on: UK corporate immigration, compliance risk, and sponsor licence governance

We are looking for someone to take ownership of our content, positioning, and website, and turn it into a high-authority, lead-generating asset.

________________________________________

The Role



This is a hands-on role.



You will be responsible for improving, restructuring, and creating content that attracts and qualifies corporate clients.

This is not about producing large volumes of content.



It is about producing the right content, aligned with real business outcomes.



This is not a general marketing role. The focus is improving existing website pages, creating new content, messaging, and enquiry quality, not running campaigns, ads, or social media.

________________________________________



Immediate Focus (First 60–90 Days)



You will take the lead on:



• Updating and rewriting core website pages in line with our new positioning 

• Adding structured FAQs and “Key Takeaways” sections to improve clarity and AI visibility 

• Finalising pricing pages and incorporating priceguide.ai 

• Creating key trust and authority pages: 

o Reviews / testimonials 

o Author / credibility pages 

o Policy / ethics / transparency pages 

• Organising existing content into a structured Learning Centre 

• Ensuring all content reflects current guidance and is regularly updated 



You are expected to take ownership of how this is done, not wait for step-by-step instructions.

________________________________________



Ongoing Responsibilities



• Develop and execute a structured content plan 

• Align content with real client questions, objections, and decisions 

• Important: Apply principles from: 

o They Ask, You Answer 

o Endless Customers 

• Support the development of content for additional channels (e.g. YouTube topics and structure) 

• Continuously improve how content supports sales conversations 

________________________________________



Leadership & Ownership



This is not a task-based role.



You are expected to:



• Take ownership of content and positioning 

• Propose improvements and challenge ideas constructively 

• Identify gaps and opportunities 

• Execute independently 



You will work directly with the founder but will not receive daily instructions.

________________________________________



The Type of Person This Suits



You may have experience as:



• Content Marketing Lead (B2B) 

• Inbound Marketing Manager 

• Growth Content Strategist 

• Marketing Manager (Professional Services or SaaS) 



You think in terms of:



• Buyer intent and decision-making 

• Lead quality (not just traffic) 

• Clear, structured communication 

• Commercial outcomes 

________________________________________



Technical Bonus (Not Essential)



Experience working directly with websites is a strong advantage.



This includes:

• Basic HTML/CSS 

• Updating pages within a CMS (we use Siteglide) 

• Improving layout, structure, and readability 

________________________________________



What Success Looks Like



• Clear, compliance-focused positioning across the website 

• Improved quality of enquiries 

• Content actively used in sales conversations 

• A structured, high-authority Learning Centre 

• Reduced low-value enquiries 

________________________________________



Requirements



• Strong written English 

• Experience creating structured, authority-led content 

• Ability to think commercially, not just creatively 

• Comfortable working directly with a founder 

• Ability to execute independently 

________________________________________



Working Arrangement



• Remote (Philippines preferred) 

• Full-time 

• Long-term contractor role 

• $1,800–$2,200 USD per month depending on experience 

• 90-day review period 

________________________________________



To Apply



Please include:



1. How would you improve the quality of enquiries from a professional services website? 

2. What would you prioritise in the first 30 days? 

3. Pick one page from our website and explain what you would change and why.

title: Content & Social Media Specialist
description:
About Rig53

Rig53 is a social network built exclusively for professional truck drivers. Currently in closed beta. Small, early-stage team. You will work alongside our Marketing & Operations Lead to build our content presence from the ground up.



Role Overview

You are a writer and content creator who understands social media and basic SEO. You will write blog posts, manage social media accounts, seed content in trucking forums, and help Rig53 get found online.



This is not a technical SEO role. You do not need to know backlinks or schema markup. You do need to know keywords, hashtags, and how to write for both people and search engines.



Responsibilities

Blog Writing:

Write 1-2 SEO-optimized blog posts per week (
words each)

Topics: trucking tips, industry news, driver lifestyle, route guides

Include keywords, headings, and meta descriptions



Social Media Management:

Schedule 7-10 posts per week across TikTok, X 
), and

Write captions that engage truck drivers

Use relevant hashtags

Monitor comments and flag engagement opportunities



Forum Content Seeding:

Post helpful content 

Answer questions and share useful information



Content Research:

Find keywords truck drivers search for

Identify trending topics in trucking

Track what competitors are posting

Weekly Reporting 

Track: blog views, social engagement, forum post replies



Submit brief weekly report to the Marketing & Operations Lead



Required Qualifications

Excellent written English (conversational, not corporate)

Experience writing blog posts or articles (samples required)

Experience managing social media accounts (personal or business)

Basic understanding of SEO (keywords, headings, meta descriptions)

Familiarity with social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Later, or Meta Business Suite)

Reliable internet and daily communication via Slack



Preferred Qualifications

Experience with trucking, logistics, or blue-collar audiences

Experience posting in online forums (Reddit, specialized communities)

Basic Canva skills for simple graphics



What Makes You Stand Out

You have grown a social media account from zero

You understand how to write for truck drivers (respectful, no fluff)

You are comfortable working under a Marketing Lead, not directly with the founder

You can work independently without constant direction



Hiring Process

Apply – Send the items below

Screening – 3 questions via chat

Paid Trial ($15 for 2-3 hours) 

Interview – 20-30 minute call with Marketing & Operations Lead 

Offer 



To Apply

Subject line: CONTENT SPECIALIST – [Your Name]



Send:

Links to 2 writing samples (blog posts, articles, or long-form social captions)

Links to 2 social media accounts you have managed (personal or business)

One keyword you would target for a blog post titled "Best truck stops in the Midwest"



Incomplete applications will not be considered.

title: Accommodation Coordinator — Close Deals Across Europe
description:
We are a fast-growing corporate housing broker placing employees from global companies into furnished apartments across Europe — Stockholm, Frankfurt, Aarhus, Rostock, Antwerp, and 50+ cities.



We get more live cases than we can close. That's why we're hiring.



This is not a call-center role. You will own real deals end-to-end and be treated like an operator, not a seat. If you're hungry and you can close, this is the fastest path we know to build a real career in European real estate and sales — from your laptop.



What you'll actually do

• Talk to real clients (HR leads, relocation managers, CEOs) and understand what they need

• Reach out to property owners across Europe — calls, WhatsApp, listings

• Negotiate and lock in a suitable apartment within 24–48 hours

• Become the expert on every property you present — know the exact number of rooms, square meters, floor, furniture, amenities, neighborhood, transit links, what's included, what's not. If a client asks "does it have a dishwasher?" you answer in 10 seconds without looking it up.

• Collect photos, details, publish the listing on our site

• Coordinate the booking through to check-in

• Own 10–15 live cases at any given time



How you get paid

• $40/week base ($160/month) to cover your time

• $15 commission per confirmed booking — uncapped

• Paid weekly, every Friday

• Our active coordinators close 5–10 bookings/month



The growth path is real

• Month 1: onboarding with our head coordinator. You shadow, then close supervised cases.

• Month 2–3: you run your own case load solo.

• After 15+ closed cases: promotion to Senior Coordinator — higher base, bigger commission, first pick of incoming cases.

• Top performers become Team Leads, managing new hires and earning on their closes too.



We already have three coordinators who started exactly where you would. One of them now leads the team.



You will fit if

• You like the phone and don't get nervous negotiating

• You can juggle 10–15 live cases without dropping balls

• You take initiative — we don't babysit

• Fluent, confident English

• You're hungry, ambitious, and want to get good at sales fast



Big plus: experience in real estate, travel, hospitality, sales, or B2B coordination.



What we give you

• A modern CRM built for this work

• AI assistants for research, outreach, and property matching

• A shared Slack team that actually helps each other close

• Direct access to the founder — no middle managers, no politics

• Clear career ladder, real ownership, real responsibility



How to apply

Send:

1. Short intro — who you are, where you are

2. Any experience with sales, calls, negotiation, or coordination

3. Why you believe you can close deals — not just "I'm hardworking"



Start your message with: READY TO CLOSE



Applications without those three words will be ignored — we only want people who can follow instructions.

title: Founding SDR / Business Development Specialist
description:
Company: Ledger Lane

Employment Type: Full-time

Location: Remote



About Ledger Lane

Ledger Lane is a new accounting brand being launched to support businesses outside of the NDIS sector. Our goal is to diversify our services and work with growing businesses across industries such as retail, cafés, hospitality, and professional services.

We are building a high-performing Sales Development team to help launch and scale the business. This role is an opportunity to join as one of the founding tea
mbers and play a key role in shaping the growth strategy of the company.



About the Role

We are looking for a top-performing Sales Development Representative (SDR) who will help build the foundation of our sales pipeline. This is not a typical SDR role — you will help launch the brand, develop outreach strategies, build lead databases, and contribute to the overall business growth plan.

You will work closely with the leadership team to identify opportunities, create systems, and generate qualified leads for the business.



Key Responsibilities

Build and maintain a high-quality database of cold leads across target industries (retail, cafés, hospitality, professional services, etc.)

Develop and execute cold outreach strategies 
, LinkedIn, calls, and other channels)

Identify and qualify potential clients for Ledger Lane accounting services

Assist with launch strategy and go-to-market planning

Contribute ideas for website development, messaging, and positioning

Research target markets and identify business opportunities

Schedule and coordinate discovery calls with prospective clients

Maintain CRM systems and track outreach activity and results

Work closely with leadership to refine the sales process



Ideal Candidate

We are looking for someone who is proactive, strategic, and capable of helping build something from the ground up.

Preferred experience includes:

Sales Development Representative (SDR), Business Development, or Lead Generation roles

Experience working with or selling to retail, café, hospitality, or small business sectors

Familiarity with the accounting or financial services industry is a strong advantage

Experience with cold outreach, CRM systems, and database building

Strong research and prospecting skills

Ability to work independently and take initiative

Key Skills

Lead generation and prospecting

SecureLine Marketing, a digital marketing agency specializing in fence contractors and other home services, is hiring a talented Video Editor & QA Specialist to edit, create, and quality-check high-converting video ads. Key Responsibilities

Video Editing & Creation

, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts

Create A/B test variations with different lengths, CTAs, and music

Design thumbnails, overlays, and graphics using Canva

Generate AI voiceovers with Eleven Labs and integrate avatars



Video QA & Quality Control



Review every video before client delivery — 100% perfect standard, no exceptions

Check technical issues: audio sync, resolution, frame rates, encoding, black frames

Maintain QA checklists and flag recurring issues

Exceptional attention to detail — catch errors other editors miss

Fluent English for scripting and proofreading captions/overlays/voiceovers

Skilled with CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut

Comfortable with structured QA processes and checklists

Available during PST hours (4+ hours overlap daily)



Bonus Skills:



Canva, Eleven Labs, ChatGPT, HeyGen/Synthesia

Experience with local service ads or Meta Business Suite

ClickUp or project management tools



Schedule & Pay



Part-time start (20–30 hrs/week) at $6-10/hour, converting to monthly salary

Flexible PST overlap (4+ hours/day) with Oregon/Texas team

Long-term role with growth to creative lead



How to Apply:

Portfolio with 1–3 short video ad examples

title: Remote Construction Estimator & Bid Coordinator (US Commercial Subcontractor)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a growing commercial construction subcontractor based in Atlanta, Georgia. We specialize in Division 9 interior finishes including painting, flooring, doors/frames/hardware (DFH), and specialty surfaces. We bid on commercial projects throughout the Atlanta metro area and Southeast US using BuildingConnected as our primary platform. We are growing fast and need a dedicated estimator to help us win more work.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are hiring a full-time remote Construction Estimator and Bid Coordinator to own our entire estimating and proposal process. This is a high-ownership role. You will be responsible for performing accurate material takeoffs, assembling pricing, and packaging complete bid proposals that win us contracts. You will manage our bid calendar, ensure nothing is missed, and make sure every submission is competitive and professional.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

- Monitor our BuildingConnected bid board daily and track all due dates

- Download and review construction drawings, specifications, and bid documents

- Perform detailed quantity takeoffs for Division 9 scopes: painting, flooring, doors/frames/hardware, and specialty surfaces

- Solicit pricing from material suppliers and vendors

- Build complete bid estimates in Excel with full cost breakdowns (labor, material, overhead, markup)

- Prepare and package professional bid proposals ready for submission

- Submit bids on time through BuildingConnected and GC portals

- Maintain a bid log tracking all proposals, follow-up status, and win/loss outcomes

- Review addenda and scope clarifications with the owner

- Build and maintain a supplier pricing database for faster future estimates



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Proficient spoken and written English — you will communicate daily with US-based general contractors, suppliers, and the company owner via
, messaging, and occasional video calls. You must be able to speak and write clearly and professionally with no significant language barrier.

- Minimum 3 years of experience in construction estimating for a US-based contractor

- Strong knowledge of Division 9 scopes: painting, flooring, doors/frames/hardware

- Ability to read and interpret US architectural drawings and CSI specifications

- Proficient in Bluebeam Revu or similar takeoff software (PlanSwift, On-Screen Takeoff)

- Advanced Microsoft Excel skills — must build structured estimate spreadsheets from scratch

- Experience with BuildingConnected or similar bid platforms (SmartBid, iSqFt)

- Strong written English for professional communication with US contractors and vendors

- Highly organized, deadline-driven, able to manage multiple bids at once

- Reliable high-speed internet and dedicated home office



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

- Prior remote work experience for a US commercial subcontractor

- Familiarity with Southeast US construction market (Georgia, Florida, Tennessee, Carolinas)

- Knowledge of RSMeans cost data

- Experience bidding tenant improvement, K-12 schools, healthcare, or government projects



COMPENSATION

- Starting salary: $400/month USD

- Salary review at 90 days — strong performers move to $600–$800/month

- Performance bonuses for bid wins, volume, and estimate accuracy

- Long-term path to $1,000+/month for top performers

- Paid weekly via Wise

- Opportunity to grow into a senior role as the company expands



A short voice or video introduction (1–2 minutes) is required as part of your application. Please record yourself briefly explaining your estimating background and send the link or file with your resume. This allows us to assess your spoken English before moving forward.



HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume and a brief description of your estimating experience. Include the types of projects you have estimated and the software you use. TO BE CONSIDERED: include the phrase "I have read the full job description and I am experienced in Division 9 estimating" in your message. Top candidates will be given a paid test takeoff before a hiring decision is made.

 and Zoom

title: Marketing Manager
description:
The Ad Firm is a Digital Marketing Agency based in Southern California, catering to clients nationwide. Since 2009, we have been a digital marketing agency that consistently helps our clients' companies grow online.



We're expanding our team and seeking a Marketing Manager to own and execute marketing for The Ad Firm itself — not client projects. This person will be the internal marketing lead, responsible for how the agency shows up in the market and for generating our own pipeline. 



To be eligible for this role, you must have experience working at a marketing agency and possess a minimum of three years of experience managing in-house or agency marketing functions. The Ad Firm is offering a remote position with flexible working hours from day one.





About the Role

As our Marketing Manager, you'll be the person behind how The Ad Firm presents itself to the world. You'll own our brand, website, content, and SEO/GEO presence, and you'll lead demand generation efforts that bring qualified prospects into our sales pipeline. 



You'll work closely with our SEO, Digital PR, Content, and Paid Media teams — the same specialists who deliver for clients — and turn their expertise into marketing that wins us new business. 



This is a senior role that is ideal for someone who wants the autonomy of owning a full marketing function without the context-switching of client work, and who gets genuinely excited about positioning an agency in a crowded space.





Key Responsibilities

- Own The Ad Firm's brand positioning, messaging, and voice across every touchpoint

- Manage and optimize 
 — content, SEO, GEO (AI search visibility), and conversion performance

- Plan and execute the content calendar for TAF (blog, case studies, thought leadership, service pages)

- Lead demand generation programs that produce qualified sales conversations

- Coordinate with internal SEO, Digital PR, and Content teams to apply agency capabilities to our own marketing

- Develop and maintain sales enablement assets — case studies, one-pagers, proposal support materials

- Track marketing performance and report on pipeline contribution, traffic, and brand metrics

- Stay close to agency industry trends, competitor positioning, and buyer behavior shifts



What We're Looking For

- 3–5 years of marketing experience, with at least some of it in a digital marketing agency setting

- Track record of owning a marketing function end-to-end, not just executing pieces of one

- Strong command of SEO and content marketing fundamentals (GEO / AI search knowledge is a plus)

- Proven ability to generate pipeline through organic channels

- Sharp writing skills and a good instinct for positioning and messaging

- Comfortable working across brand, website, content, and demand gen without needing a big team

- Self-directed, strategic, and execution-oriented in equal measure

- Paid media and
 marketing experience is a plus



Why Join Us?

- Own a full marketing function with real autonomy — no client context-switching

- Direct access to senior SEO, Digital PR, and Content specialists to support your work

- Collaborative, fast-paced, and growth-focused agency culture

- Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses

- Support for professional growth and access to top industry tools

- Flexible remote work options from day one

- 2 weeks Paid Time-Off

- Paid Sick Leave

- 8 Paid Holidays

- Health Insurance



Ready to Apply?

If you're ready to own how an agency markets itself and you want the space to do it well, we want to hear from you. Submit your resume, a portfolio or examples of marketing work you've led, and a brief note on why you're the perfect fit.



How to Apply:

We do not monitor
s on this website. Submit your application at 
= to be considered for this position.

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company producing high-converting video ads for DTC brands in industries such as supplements, footwear, and lifestyle products.



We are looking to hire 2 AI Video Editors to start immediately by the end of this week.



The ideal candidate can create extremely realistic AI-generated video ads that are indistinguishable from real footage, with strong editing and creative skills for direct-response advertising.



This role is ideal for someone who understands performance marketing, high-volume creative production, and AI video generation tools.





What You'll Do

• Produce 20–50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Create AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll scenes using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta Ads Library and Google to develop high-converting ad variations

• Concept, build, and iterate multiple creative angles and hooks that drive conversions

• Assist with script refinement or hook optimization when needed (scripts usually provided)





What We're Looking For

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a strong portfolio

• Ability to create extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Strong understanding of direct-response ad creative and what makes ads convert

• Ability to work independently and produce high-volume creative output





Nice to Have

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools

• Experience creating UGC-style ads for paid social





Role Details

• Part-time role (32 hours per week)

• Flexible schedule Monday–Saturday

• Remote position

• We are hiring 2 editors immediately and expect onboarding by the end of this week





How to Apply

To confirm you read this entire post, start your application with the phrase:



AICreator492



Then answer the following questions:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut.

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced).

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"?

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential?

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit?

6. Please share your portfolio of extremely realistic AI-generated ecommerce video ads that demonstrate your ability to create converting content.





If you're passionate about AI video creation, performance marketing, and high-volume creative production, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Amazon PPC Specialist VA
description:
Job Summary:



We are seeking a skilled Amazon Marketing Expert to lead the full growth strategy for our Amazon store. This is a senior-level role for someone who understands both the art and science of Amazon — from building high-converting listings to running profitable ad campaigns and improving organic keyword rankings. We need a strategic thinker who can work independently and deliver consistent results.





Key Responsibilities:



- Lead the planning, launch, and ongoing optimization of Amazon PPC campaigns including SP, SB, and SD ad types

- Build out campaign structures and manage bids and budgets with a focus on improving ACoS, TACoS, and return on ad spend

- Own listing strategy from titles and bullet points through to A+ Content and product descriptions

- Collaborate with the design team on image strategy and visual content to increase conversion rates

- Perform deep keyword research and continuously expand keyword coverage to improve organic rankings

- Align paid advertising with organic SEO strategy for a cohesive growth approach

- Track and analyze store performance metrics including CTR, CVR, revenue, and profitability

- Plan and execute launch strategies for new products entering the marketplace

- Report weekly on performance with clear insights and strategic recommendations

- Work closely with the operations team to stay aligned on stock levels, promotions, and pricing





Mandatory Skills:



- Proven Amazon PPC experience with a clear history of delivering measurable results

- Solid understanding of Amazon's algorithm, conversion drivers, and ranking factors

- Experience in comprehensive listing optimization including A+ Content and content strategy

- Working knowledge of Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar platforms

- Strong data analysis skills with the ability to convert insights into actionable growth plans

- High level of accountability and the ability to operate independently

- Clear and professional English communication skills

- Reliable, meticulous, and capable of managing multiple priorities





Preferred Skills:



- Experience across multiple Amazon brands or large product catalogs

- Proven success scaling products to high revenue levels

- Practical experience executing Amazon product launches

- Exposure to external traffic channels such as TikTok Ads, influencers, or paid social

- History of working alongside creative and operations teams in a collaborative setup





Why Join Us:



This is a rare opportunity to step into a true ownership role within a growing Amazon business. You will set the strategy, run the campaigns, and see your decisions reflected in real revenue outcomes. With dedicated support from operations and design, you can focus entirely on driving growth — and your contributions will be recognized.

title: Senior Performance Marketing Specialist (Google & Meta Ads)
description:
We are seeking a world-class Performance Marketing Specialist to spearhead our growth engine. This is not a "set and forget" role; we are looking for a strategic thinker who can manage significant ad spends across Google and Meta ecosystems, translating complex data into scalable revenue growth. The ideal candidate is a hybrid of a creative strategist and a data scientist.



Key Responsibilities

Full-Funnel Management: Strategy, execution, and scaling of Google Ads (Search, PMax, YouTube, Shopping) and Meta Ads 
/Instagram) to hit aggressive ROAS and CAC targets.



Data Architecture: Oversee tracking and attribution using Google Tag Manager, GA4, and Meta Pixel to ensure 100?ta accuracy in a post-iOS14 world.



Optimization & Testing: Lead a rigorous A/B testing roadmap for ad creatives, landing pages, and bidding strategies to constantly beat the control.



Strategic Reporting: Build automated dashboards (Looker Studio/Tableau) to communicate performance insights and growth opportunities to stakeholders.



Market Leadership: Stay at the forefront of AI-driven advertising, Alpha/Beta features, and privacy-first marketing trends.



Candidate Profile

Proven Track Record: At least 4+ years of hands-on experience managing high-budget campaigns ($50k+/month) with a focus on conversion and scale.



Technical Mastery: Deep expertise in Google Ads Editor,
 Business Manager, GA4, and GTM.



Analytical Rigor: Proficiency in Excel/SQL and the ability to find "the story" within the data.



Creative Intuition: Ability to collaborate with designers to develop high-converting ad assets based on performance data.



English Fluency: Exceptional professional communication skills, suitable for a global business environment.



What We Offer

Competitive Compensation: High-tier salary with a performance-based bonus structure.



Innovation Autonomy: The freedom to test new channels, tools, and unconventional strategies.



Professional Growth: Access to premium industry events, certifications, and advanced marketing technology.



Impact: A seat at the table where your work directly dictates the company’s growth trajectory.



How to Apply

We are looking for the best in the field. If you have the data to prove your success, please submit your CV and a brief Performance Portfolio (case studies or managed spend/ROI results) to:



:

 Ads will be contacted.

title: Marketing Assistant (Remote, Australian Hours)
description:

$10-12 AUD per hour (based on experience)

10am to 6pm AEST, Monday to Friday (7 paid hours plus 1 hour unpaid lunch)

Fully remote, working alongside an Australian team



About Dale Carnegie



Dale Carnegie is a global training organisation. The founder wrote How to Win Friends and Influence People, and for over a century we've helped people and teams build communication, leadership, and sales capability. We're ranked among the top 20 leadership development companies globally.



In Australia, we run open enrolment training courses and work with some of the country's largest organisations on leadership development, sales capability, and culture change. The marketing team is small, fast-moving, and focused on doing good work.



The role



The Marketing Assistant supports the Marketing Manager across campaigns, content, and digital channels. It's hands-on, with real ownership of the day-to-day execution, not a research-only seat.



What the role covers:



Helping plan and run marketing campaigns end to end

Planning and executing regular
 campaigns (with the help of a Claude AI agent) that engage and nurture our audience

, and LinkedIn

Project work as directed by the Marketing Manager



What we're looking for

Strong, clear, professional written and verbal English. This one matters. The role involves daily writing across website copy,
s, and social, plus regular communication with the Australian team.

Previous experience in a marketing assistant or similar role

Working knowledge of the Microsoft Office Suite

Experience with CRM and CMS systems. Salesforce and/or Salesforce Marketing Cloud is a real advantage.

Keen eye for detail

Nice to have:
