title: Operations & Growth Manager (OGM)
description:
Operations & Growth Manager (OGM)

(Part-Time, Remote – Australian Business Hours)



Are you someone who naturally brings order to chaos and takes the lead?

Do you thrive in fast-moving environments where things change daily, and your ability to stay organised, think ahead, and keep everything running smoothly actually matters?

We’re looking for a highly capable Operations and Growth Manager (OGM) to support a growing home services cleaning business based in Victoria, Australia.

This is not a typical “VA” role.

This is an opportunity to step into a key operational position within the business for the long-term, starting part-time (20 hours per week), with a clear pathway to full-time as the business continues to grow and can justify a full-time position.

________________________________________



About the Role

This role sits at the centre of the business operations.

Upon starting, your focus will be on learning and managing our job management system (ServiceM8), supporting job scheduling, coordinating workflows, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

Over time, the role will evolve into a broader operational and growth support position, where you will contribute to improving systems, supporting customer workflows, and assisting with business development activities such as lead generation.

You will work closely with the business owner and play a critical role in helping the business scale and also maintain excellent customer service and delivery.

________________________________________



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Job Management (Primary Focus)

• Learn and manage ServiceM8 (job scheduling and workflow management). 

• Coordinate daily job schedules and ensure efficient allocation of work. 

• Monitor job progress and ensure tasks are completed on time. 

• Adjust schedules dynamically as priorities shift. 

• Maintain clean, accurate and up-to-date job data. 

________________________________________

CRM & Workflow Management

• Manage and maintain our CRM system (Salesforce). 

• Track leads, jobs, employees, and customer interactions. 

• Support pipeline visibility and follow-up processes.

• Ensure no leads or opportunities are missed. 

________________________________________

Customer Communication (Non-Phone Initially)

• Manage inboxes and respond to customer enquiries via
 and messaging. 

• Handle follow-ups, confirmations, and basic coordination. 

• Maintain a high standard of written communication and professionalism. 

________________________________________

Process Improvement & Admin Support

• Identify inefficiencies and help streamline workflows. 

• Support the creation and documentation of SOPs. 

• Assist with general operational and administrative tasks as required. 

________________________________________

Growth Support (Introduced Over Time)

• Assist with lead generation and tracking activities. 

• Support and drive business development initiatives as the role evolves. 

________________________________________



About You

You are not just organised, you are operationally sharp and treat the business like it’s your own.

You are dynamic in the way you think and operate – you have strong attention to detail and doing things right, and you also have the ability to be creative, innovative and agile. 

You take ownership, communicate clearly, and naturally stay one step ahead.

You are comfortable working in an environment where priorities can shift, and you can adapt quickly without losing structure, and can wear multiple hats.

You are not a typical ‘task taker,’ you think ahead and take initiative because you truly care about the success of the business, and not just ‘getting paid.’

You genuinely value growth, integrity, learning and thinking of ways to have a greater impact in all that you do.

You MUST have your own safe, private and dedicated working environment with a dedicated computer, strong internet, phone, and power infrastructure to ensure punctuality and reliability.

________________________________________



Experience & Skills

• Minimum of 4 years of experience working with CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce, Go High Level, HubSpot or similar) is essential. 

• Minimum 2 years of experience with job management or scheduling systems (e.g. ServiceM8 or similar) is highly regarded, but not required.

• Marketing and business development experience is highly regarded.

• Strong written English and communication skills.

• High attention to detail and accuracy. 

• Strong organisational and time management skills. 

• Tech-savvy with the ability to learn new systems quickly. 

________________________________________



Personal Attributes

• Proactive and takes initiative 

• Highly responsive and reliable 

• Able to prioritise and stay calm under pressure 

• Strong sense of accountability and integrity 

• Adaptable and comfortable in a fast-moving environment 

• Punctual and consistent in communication and delivery 

________________________________________



What’s on Offer

• Part-time role: 20 hours per week (4 hours per day, Monday–Friday). 

• Remote position (must be available during Australian business hours). 

• Clear pathway to full-time as the business grows. 

• Opportunity to step into a key operational role within a growing business. 

• Work directly with the business owner and contribute to real growth outcomes. 

________________________________________



How to Apply

Please submit:

• Your CV 

• A short summary outlining your experience with CRM systems and any scheduling/job management tools and anything else you deem relevant. 

• Briefly explain how you typically stay organised in a fast-paced environment and what sets you apart from other candidates. Please ensure your summary is written by you tailored to this role. Do NOT provide an AI generated response (I can tell). 



Important note: 

Please ONLY apply if you are open to growing into a full-time role over time and are looking for a long-term position within one business only. Further, a lack of punctuality, integrity, professionalism, strong communication with the client will not be tolerated. Please only apply for this role if you think you would be in your natural environment and it strongly aligns with your CV. If this role feels like a ‘stretch’ for you and doesn’t align with your skillset or experience, please do not apply.

title: Tech Operations and Automation Manager ($1,500–$2,000/month)
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Connect tools across the company (CRM, forms, surveys, Slack, Airtable, Kajabi)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Kajabi & Fulfillment Support

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
***At Polaris, we’re on the lookout for a driven, detail-oriented, and marketing-savvy Marketing and Acquisitions Assistant to join our world-class team. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, love the idea of being the operational backbone of a company’s marketing engine, and have strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, content creation, CRM systems, and social media, this role is for you.



***About us:

Polaris is a consulting agency with a bold mission: To help 1 million Founders to leverage time, reclaim freedom, and scale without sacrifice. We’re the only firm blending coaching and done-for-you services through a hybrid model — empowering our clients with strategic delegation, streamlined operations, and scalable systems. 



***Who we are looking for:

We’re looking for a proactive implementer and critical thinker — someone who can own the execution of digital marketing systems from A to Z. You’ll be the strong link the Founder can rely on, responsible for setting up, executing, and optimizing all marketing touchpoints across CRM, content, social media, funnels, ads, and lead follow-up. This role is perfect for someone who thrives in supporting visionaries, brings technical marketing skills to the table, and gets excited about driving results behind the scenes.



***Your mission:

Be the driving force behind the marketing engine of an established, fast-growing company. You won’t just support growth — you’ll architect it. By managing the daily execution of CRM, funnels, social media, and content systems, your role will directly help scale client acquisition, multiply impact, and buy back the Founder’s time.



***Role Responsibilities

Set up and manage GHL sub-accounts, funnels, workflows, and
 campaigns

Edit and repurpose content (Canva, CapCut, Descript)

Manage FB, IG, and LinkedIn content + engagement

Track metrics: CPL, CTR, conversions, UTM, Pixel, GA

Handle outreach, DMs, follow-ups, and pipeline management



***Requirements

3+ years virtual work experience

Strong English communication

Proven GoHighLevel experience (agency-level preferred)

Skilled in graphic/video editing

Social media management experience

Strong attention to detail, systems thinking, and project management



***Schedule & Compensation

Full-time, Monday–Friday

Timezone depends on role (NA, EU, AUS/APAC)

Starting at $5/hr, with bonuses, training, growth, and WFH perks



***How to Apply

Submit your application here:





Please do NOT private message us regarding this job. We have a hiring process in place and will only accept applicants who can follow the process.



Place the word "I am" at the start of your full name in the application form.

title: Executive assistant
description:
Summary

Virtual Assistant / Virtual Receptionist + Operations Support

We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and professional Virtual Assistant who can also function as a virtual receptionist and day-to-day operations support for our busy, high-end clinic.

We are an established medical spa with a fast-paced environment, multiple providers, and a strong focus on client experience, accountability, and smooth internal operations. We need someone who can help keep the clinic organized behind the scenes, support front-end administrative tasks, and ensure important tasks are being followed through properly.



Role Overview

This is not a basic admin role. We are looking for someone who can help manage daily operations, support reception tasks virtually, and audit team performance to ensure nothing is being missed.

This role requires real-time availability and active presence during working hours.



Schedule & Requirements

Must be available during Mountain Standard Time (MST) clinic hours

Must be logged into Zoom and available on camera/active communication while working

Starting as a part-time role with transition into full-time for the right candidate

Must be responsive, present, and engaged throughout shift (this is not passive work)



Main Responsibilities

Virtual Reception / Client Support

Respond to client inquiries in a professional and timely manner

Manage
, SMS, and communication platforms

Assist with bookings, confirmations, rescheduling, and follow-ups

Monitor missed calls, voi
s, and ensure proper follow-up

Maintain a polished, high-end client communication standard



Operations Support

Oversee day-to-day administrative operations remotely

Track tasks and ensure completion by tea
mbers

Organize workflows, checklists, and internal systems

Identify inefficiencies or gaps in operations

Auditing + Accountability

Audit task completion across the team

Ensure staff are following required procedures and workflows

Verify notes, charting, follow-ups, and required actions are completed

Flag issues, inconsistencies, or missed responsibilities

Help create stronger accountability across the clinic

Systems + Administrative Support

Work within clinic systems (booking, communication, task management)

Organize internal documents, SOPs, and forms

Assist in updating templates, processes, and internal communication

Provide ongoing administrative support to management



What We’re Looking For

Strong administrative and organizational skills

Experience as a Virtual Assistant, Receptionist, or Operations Coordinator

Excellent written and verbal communication

High attention to detail and strong follow-up skills

Professional, polished, and calm communication style

Ability to manage multiple moving parts in a fast-paced environment

Discretion and professionalism with confidential information

Ability to be present, accountable, and engaged during working hours



Ideal Experience

Experience in a medical spa, clinic, beauty, or healthcare environment is a strong asset

Experience with scheduling systems, CRM tools, and communication platforms

Experience in auditing workflows, accountability tracking, or operations support



What Success Looks Like

Client communication is consistent, timely, and professional

Tasks are completed and not falling through the cracks

Tea
mbers are held accountable

Operations feel organized, structured, and efficient

Management has clear visibility on performance and issues



Growth Opportunity

This role has strong potential to grow into a full-time operations support position for the right candidate who proves reliability, consistency, and leadership.



To Apply

Please include:

Relevant experience

Experience in clinics/medical spa/service-based businesses (if applicable)

Systems/platforms you’ve worked with

Examples of operations or admin support

Your availability (MST) and fixed rate



111To confirm you have read this posting in full, please include the word “Accountability” at the top of your application.

title: Logistics Coordinator
description:
Join Our Team as a Logistics Coordinator!

Rate: $5/hour

Schedule: US Time Zone (PST| Permanent Remote Role



Are you passionate about efficiency and problem-solving? We’re looking for a Logistics Coordinator who thrives in a fast-paced environment, optimizing routes, coordinating with drivers, and ensuring deliveries are completed accurately and on time.



If you enjoy analyzing data, adjusting plans in real time, and keeping operations running smoothly, this role is for you.



Role Highlights: 

- Plan and optimize delivery routes for maximum efficiency

- Coordinate closely with drivers and dispatch teams to meet daily targets

- Monitor operations in real time and make necessary adjustments

- Analyze delivery data and recommend process improvements

- Ensure timely and accurate updates in logistics systems

- Maintain strong communication with internal teams and clients



What We’re Looking For:

- Strong analytical and technical skills

- Experience using routing or logistics software

- Ability to work independently and adapt to changing priorities

- Excellent communication and coordination skills

- High attention to detail and accuracy

title: Graphic Designer & Ad Creative Specialist
description:
You'll be the go-to person for every static ad creative, social media graphic, Story template, and visual asset across our client portfolio. This is not a generic design role, you'll be creating performance-driven ad creatives that need to stop the scroll, communicate a clear offer, and drive clicks. You'll also create organic social media content (Instagram feed posts, Story graphics) for select clients.



You'll work directly with the founder and will be briefed on angles, offers, and campaign goals. You don't need to write the copy, we handle that. You need to bring it to life visually in a way that converts.



What You'll Be Doing



Ad Creatives (Primary Focus — ~60% of your time)



•Design static ad creatives for
 and Instagram campaigns across 
+ client accounts



•Refresh underperforming creatives quickly when campaigns need a boost



•Design creatives for new campaign launches and offer changes



•Maintain a consistent but varied creative style that feels premium and scroll-stopping



Social Media Graphics (~25% of your time)



•Design Instagram feed posts and carousels for select clients



•Create Instagram Story templates and graphics for promotional sprints (e.g., location-based clinic launches)



•Build backlog content batches (e.g., 10-20 posts at a time for new client onboarding)



Video Support (~15% of your time)



•Create simple motion graphics, animated text overlays, and video thumbnails



•Assist with basic video editing when needed (cutting clips, adding text, transitions)



•This is NOT a primary video editing role, we have a separate editing team for complex video work



Test Project (Required Before Hire)



Before we make a decision, we'll send you a paid test project. You'll receive:



1.A brief for 4 static ad creatives — we'll provide the offer, the angles, the copy, and reference examples. You design 5 different static ads that are ready to run on
/Instagram.



2.A brief for 3 Instagram Story graphics — we'll provide the context and copy. You design 3 Story-format graphics for a promotional sprint.



3.A brief for 1 short video ad (15-30 seconds) — we'll provide the footage/assets and the script. You edit it into a simple but polished video ad with text overlays and transitions.



Turnaround time: 48 hours from receiving the brief. Compensation for test project: $20 (paid regardless of outcome).



This is how we evaluate speed, quality, attention to the brief, and creative instinct. The strongest candidate gets the role.



------



How to Apply



Send us:



1.Your portfolio or a link to your best work (ad creatives specifically - not logos or branding work)



2.A short message (2-3 sentences) on why you're a good fit for this role with the subject "fanta"



3.Your availability to start (ideally for Monday or Tuesday - 20th or 21st)

title: Senior Web Developer
description:
Job Description





The Ad Firm is a Digital Marketing Agency based in Southern California, serving clients nationwide. Since 2009, we’ve helped businesses grow through SEO, content, and performance-driven digital strategies.



We’re expanding our team and looking for a Senior Web Developer to lead how our websites are built from the ground up. This is not a production role. This is a systems-level engineering role for someone who understands that websites are not just design deliverables, they are performance assets that need to rank, scale, and hold up under real-world conditions.



This is a remote position with flexible working hours from day one.





About the Role



Own the technical foundation of the websites we build

Architect, develop, and optimize custom builds for SEO, performance, and scalability

Work closely with SEO, Content, and Digital PR teams to ensure strong technical execution

Build systems that are clean, scalable, and maintainable

Focus on engineering quality over page builders or pre-built themes



Key Responsibilities



Architect and build fully custom WordPress websites (themes, plugins, ACF-driven structures)

Engineer sites for speed, scalability, and strong Core Web Vitals performance

Handle server environments, deployments, and infrastructure decisions

Integrate APIs and third-party systems cleanly and reliably

Own technical SEO implementation (crawlability, indexation, structured data)

Manage DNS, CDN (Cloudflare), SMTP, and hosting configurations

Work across Shopify and BigCommerce at the code level when needed

Implement accurate tracking (GA4, GTM) without compromising data integrity

Debug issues across the full stack (server, backend, frontend performance)



What We’re Looking For



5+ years of web development experience in agency or performance-driven environments

Deep expertise in PHP (including WordPress core-level development)

Strong JavaScript experience with modern frameworks and tooling

Working knowledge of Python (automation, scraping, tooling)

Proven experience building custom WordPress websites from scratch

Strong understanding of technical SEO and its impact on architecture and performance

Ability to diagnose and solve full-stack issues independently



What Sets You Apart



You think in systems, not pages

Experience working on large-scale or SEO-heavy websites

Strong understanding of crawlability, indexation, and internal linking at scale

Experience with schema and structured data implementation

Exposure to programmatic SEO or dynamic page generation

Experience handling real-world constraints (traffic spikes, broken deployments, legacy rebuilds)



Strong Advantages



Experience with CI/CD pipelines and Git workflows

Familiarity with Docker or modern dev environments

Experience with log analysis and advanced debugging

Security hardening and site recovery experience

Experience with multi-site or multi-location SEO builds



What We Don’t Want



Heavy reliance on page builders

Plugin-first approaches to performance and SEO

Developers who need constant direction or step-by-step instructions



Why Join Us?



High ownership with real technical decision-making

Clean builds with no unnecessary bloat

Direct collaboration with SEO, Content, and Digital PR specialists

A team that values performance, scalability, and engineering quality

Competitive salary and performance-based incentives

Flexible remote work from day one

2 weeks Paid Time-Off

Paid Sick Leave

8 Paid Holidays

Health Insurance



Ready to Apply?



Submit your resume

Include a portfolio with examples of custom builds

Add a short note on how you approach building high-performance websites



How to Apply:



We do not monitor
s on this website. Submit your application at 
= to be considered for this position.

title: Talent Sourcer & Recruitment Operations Specialist (Hebrew Market)
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Standard Time (IST)



Mission Statement

As a Talent Sourcer & Operations Specialist, you will be the engine of our "Recruitment Factory." You will be responsible for identifying high-quality Israeli talent, initiating contact, and performing a rigorous "Semi-Human / Semi-Automatic" screening process using advanced AI tools. Your goal is to deliver "ready-to-interview" leads to our Israeli recruiting team.



Key Responsibilities (The Workflow)

Advanced Sourcing: Execute complex Boolean searches and X-ray searches on LinkedIn Recruiter and our internal database of 270k resumes.



Data Intelligence: Build and manage LinkedIn Projects. Use tools like Improver to extract personal contact details 
s/phone numbers).



Multi-Channel Outreach:



Send initial contact
s to potential candidates.



Manage LinkedIn follow-ups (The 24/48-hour rule) to ensure maximum engagement.



Execute massive WhatsApp outreach using predefined Hebrew templates.



AI-Powered Screening (The "Semi-Human" Process):



Analyze candidate CVs against job requirements.



Use Gemini/ChatGPT to generate specific, professional screening questions in Hebrew to verify candidate suitability.



Manage candidate responses through translation tools (DeepL/ChatGPT) to categorize them as "Hot Leads" or "Not Relevant."



Lead Handoff: Ensure the CRM (ATS) is updated in real-time. Prepare a "Candidate Snapshot" for the Israeli recruiter, highlighting why the candidate is a match and their answers to the AI-generated screening questions.



Technical Requirements

LinkedIn Expertise: 2+ years of experience with LinkedIn Recruiter (Building projects, InMail, Sourcing).



CRM/ATS Management: Proven experience working with recruitment systems (Data entry and pipeline management).



AI Proficiency: Experience using ChatGPT/Gemini for data analysis or content generation.



Tools: Mastery of Google Workspace, DeepL/Translation tools, and browser extensions (like Improver, Apollo, etc.).



Qualifications & Skills

Exceptional English: Native or near-native written English (C1/C2 level) is mandatory.



Attention to Detail: Extreme precision is required when managing Hebrew templates and translations.



Analytical Mindset: Ability to read between the lines of a CV and identify key professional milestones.



Multi-tasking: Ability to manage dozens of conversations and sourcing tasks simultaneously without compromising quality.



Proactive Follow-up: A "hunter" mentality to follow up with candidates until a response is received.

title: Outbound SDR
description:
VentureX is a New Zealand-based offshore recruitment and project delivery company that helps Kiwi businesses build dedicated teams in the Philippines. We place talent across sales, operations, tech, and support with a direct-hire model that keeps things transparent, fair, and built for the long term. We are not a BPO. The people we place work exclusively for one business, operate like part of an in-house team, and are treated that way.



We are currently hiring an SDR on behalf of one of our clients, a fast-growing New Zealand AI company that builds intelligent voice and chat agents for businesses across industries. Their product replaces expensive, time-limited customer service staff with AI that handles calls, books appointments, and follows up automatically, 24/7. The value proposition is strong, and the market is hot. 



Your job is to get the right people on the phone so our NZ-based closers can do their thing.



What you will be doing:



Running multichannel outreach every day across
, LinkedIn, and direct messaging, following a proven system we provide. Scripts, sequences, targeting criteria, and tools are already set up. You execute consistently, track your numbers, and book qualified discovery calls for our closing team in New Zealand.



What we are looking for:



You have done outbound SDR or appointment setting work before, and you can prove it. You are comfortable with cold outreach, and you do not fold after the first no. Your written English is clear, professional, and natural. You are organised, self-managed, and you own your results. You are available to work New Zealand business hours or close to them. You are coachable and process-driven.



There are multiple roles available

title: HIRING Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand
description:
HIRING Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand



About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Google (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Test UGC-style videos, TikTok-style ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs (hook rate, hold rate, CVR)

- Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager + other editors to push volume

- Source raw footage & voiceovers to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses

- Fully remote role

- Direct collaboration with a high-performing editors, strategists and Founder

- Managed under a dedicated Creative Manager who oversees editors and strategy



How to Apply

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads

title: Bookkeeper/ Accountant
description:
APPLY HERE: 



Blueprint Workforce is a U.S.-based workforce partner for construction, design, and trade businesses. We don't place generic virtual assistants. We place specialists into defined roles with structured onboarding, clear SOPs, and ongoing support.

We're hiring a Bookkeeper AR/AP to manage accounts receivable, accounts payable, and financial reporting for U.S.-based construction and trade companies.



This is not light data entry. You'll own invoicing, bill payments, job costing, bank reconciliations, and financial reporting. Construction bookkeeping has its own rules: AIA billing, retention tracking, job cost allocation, and progress invoicing. You need to know the difference or be ready to learn fast.

WHAT YOU'LL DO:



Manage accounts receivable: invoicing, payment tracking, collections follow-up, and aging reports

Manage accounts payable: bill entry, payment scheduling, vendor management, and approval workflows

Perform bank and credit card reconciliations weekly or monthly

Maintain job costing records: allocate expenses to projects, track budgets vs. actuals

Process AIA billing and progress invoicing for construction projects

Track retention receivable and payable across active projects

Prepare financial reports: P&L, balance sheet, cash flow, and job cost reports

Support month-end and year-end close processes

Maintain organized financial records and documentation for audits and tax preparation

Coordinate with CPAs, project managers, and company leadership on financial data



TOOLS YOU SHOULD KNOW (some or all):



QuickBooks Online or QuickBooks Desktop

Xero

Sage 100 Contractor or Foundation Software

FreshBooks

AIA billing formats and processes

Excel/Google Sheets (advanced: formulas, reporting, reconciliation templates)



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



2+ years of experience in bookkeeping, accounting, or financial administration

Strong proficiency in QuickBooks or similar accounting software

Construction industry bookkeeping experience is strongly preferred (job costing, AIA billing, retention)

Understanding of AR/AP workflows, bank reconciliation, and financial reporting

You're accurate, detail-oriented, and catch discrepancies before they compound

You can manage financial data for multiple projects or entities simultaneously

You handle sensitive financial information with complete confidentiality

Strong written English communication for coordinating with U.S.-based teams

You're comfortable working U.S. business hours (aligned with your client's time zone)

Stable internet connection and a professional remote work setup



WHAT BLUEPRINT PROVIDES:



Full-time, long-term placement (this is not project-based or seasonal)

Structured 48-hour onboarding with role-specific training and SOPs

Dedicated support specialist for your first 90 days

Regular check-ins: Day 3, Day 30, Day 60, Day 90, then quarterly

Payroll processed through Gusto (direct deposit)

10 days PTO annually (after 90-day probation) + 5 sick days (available immediately)

A company that invests in your success, not just your output



WHY BLUEPRINT IS DIFFERENT:



Most offshore staffing companies hand you a job title and disappear. Blueprint doesn't.

Every placement goes through an 81-question behavioral assessment matched across 6 dimensions. You're not just "available"; you're matched to a role where you'll actually perform and grow.

You get structured onboarding, real support, and a team that treats you as a professional, not a commodity.

We retain 98% of our placements at 6 months. That's not an a
. It's because we build systems that set you up to succeed.



HOW TO APPLY:

APPLY HERE: 



Complete your application through our platform. The process includes a behavioral assessment that matches you to the right role and the right client. No generic applications. No guessing.



If you're ready to be placed, not just hired, apply now.

title: Cold Email Campaign Specialist
description:
About the role:

We are looking for a dependable and results-driven
 Campaign Specialist to join our remote marketing team. You will be responsible for setting up, managing, and optimizing
 campaigns end-to-end using Plusvibe and other
 tools. We value integrity above all — we want someone who is honest, reliable, and takes ownership of their work. If you're a strong English communicator who is passionate about
 marketing and takes pride in doing things right, we'd love to hear from you.



What you'll do:

- Set up, schedule, and deploy
 campaigns from start to finish using Plusvibe

- Build and manage
 sequences including welcome flows, drip campaigns, and promotional blasts

- Segment and maintain subscriber lists to ensure accurate targeting

- Write and edit clear, engaging
 copy and subject lines in fluent English

- Configure automation workflows and triggers within Plusvibe

- Monitor campaign performance (open rates, CTRs, conversions) and provide regular reports

- Conduct A/B tests and apply data-driven improvements

- Ensure all campaigns are on-brand, mobile-friendly, and compliant with
 best practices

- Communicate proactively with the team and flag any issues promptly and transparently



What we're looking for:

- Experience with Plusvibe is highly preferred — please mention your experience in your application

- 2+ years of hands-on experience setting up and managing
 campaigns

- Strong command of written and spoken English — clear, professional communication is a must

- Solid understanding of
 campaign setup, list segmentation, and deliverability

- Honest and transparent — someone who admits mistakes quickly and communicates openly

- Reliable and consistent — meets deadlines, follows through on commitments, and shows up every day

- Trustworthy and self-directed — able to work independently without constant supervision

- Highly organized and able to manage multiple campaigns at the same time

- Stable internet connection and a quiet, dedicated workspace



Nice to have:

- Experience with other ESPs such as Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or ActiveCampaign

- Basic HTML/CSS knowledge for
 template editing

- Familiarity with UTM tracking and Google Analytics

- Background in AI tools or SaaS
 marketing



Our ideal candidate:

We're not just looking for technical skills — character matters just as much to us. Our ideal hire is someone who takes their work seriously, communicates honestly even when things go wrong, and can be trusted to represent our brand without micromanagement. If you describe yourself as hardworking, dependable, and a person of integrity, you'll fit right in.



How to apply:



Send your application through OnlineJobs.ph and include:

- Your updated resume/CV

- A short cover letter in English describing your
 campaign experience — especially any Plusvibe experience

- Examples or screenshots of campaigns you've set up and managed

- Your available start date and expected monthly salary



Applications that do not include a cover letter will not be considered. We read every application personally.



Good luck applicants!

title: LinkedIn Content Writer VA
description:
Job Summary:



A growing B2B ghostwriting agency is hiring a LinkedIn Content Creator to support its content production team. This position focuses on writing LinkedIn posts, building content pipelines, drafting engagement comments, and preparing design briefs across multiple client accounts. We are looking for someone with a creative mind, strong writing instincts, and the willingness to learn quickly in a dynamic, content-first environment.





Key Responsibilities:



- Write clear, engaging LinkedIn posts tailored to diverse B2B clients and industries

- Generate a steady pipeline of content ideas aligned with each client's brand and goals

- Draft strategic engagement comments that drive meaningful interaction on LinkedIn posts

- Produce design briefs that communicate visual content requirements clearly and effectively

- Integrate AI tools into research, drafting, and content planning workflows

- Use Canva to support visual brief development or basic content design

- Coordinate with tea
mbers to ensure brand voice consistency across all client accounts

- Research LinkedIn trends and apply relevant insights to content strategy and execution







Mandatory Skills:



- Skilled writer capable of adapting voice, tone, and style to multiple brands simultaneously

- Naturally creative with a strong ability to develop original, relevant content ideas regularly

- Proficient in Canva for visual content tasks or creative brief preparation

- Experienced and confident using AI writing tools as part of a professional workflow

- Fast learner who can quickly internalize new brand voices and client contexts

- Curious, engaged, and motivated by topics related to business, marketing, and content strategy

- Thorough, dependable, and able to manage a varied workload with consistency

- Effective communicator who contributes positively within a remote team environment





Preferred Skills:



- Previous experience producing LinkedIn content for business brands or individual thought leaders

- Familiarity with ghostwriting, content marketing, or working within a content agency

- Understanding of LinkedIn content mechanics, including post formats and engagement strategies

- Track record of managing content for multiple clients or brand identities at once

- Self-starter who proactively brings new ideas and content strategies to the table







Why Join Us:



This role offers a genuine opportunity to grow inside a content agency that puts quality writing at the center of everything it does. You will gain broad experience across B2B industries and build skills that open doors across the content and marketing space. If you are motivated by great writing, enjoy creative problem-solving, and want to be part of a team that supports your development, this is the role for you.

title: Sales Manager
description:
PLEASE APPLY HERE: 




 builds outbound sales teams for founder-led, bootstrapped, B2B companies ($500K to $5M ARR) in the US and Europe. We need an additional Sales Team Implementation Manager to help us scale.

  

In this role, you’ll lead and manage client sales team implementations end-to-end, while partnering closely with our founder on strategy, priorities, and continuous improvement of our outbound playbook. 



This is a high-ownership seat: part client delivery, part sales operations oversight, and a key right hand to a strategic executive.



The ideal candidate must be a strong sales leader, but also must be able to work with and alongside other strong personalities. Why? 



Your sales leadership experience will allow you to slot directly into this role, since you already know the general management principles of dialing and sales teams. However, you'll be following the 
 playbook and working with the 
 founder to adjust that playbook to the realities of the specific client.



Additionally, you'll be interacting with the founder (or founders) on the client side. If it's not already clear, bootstrapped founders tend to have very strong personalities.



What You’ll Be Doing:

 • Lead outbound sales implementations for a 
 client.

 • Translate our outbound sales playbook into practical hiring, onboarding, metrics, and performance systems for the client.

 • Directly manage offshore dialers and salespeople, maintaining accountability through scorecards and simple performance rhythms.

 • Run performance reviews with the client team, assess progress, and work with the 
 founder to adjust strategy as needed.

 • Work closely with our founder on non-client-facing founder priorities: process upgrades, internal projects, and playbook refinements.

 • Keep implementation projects organized, including timelines, deliverables, handoffs, and documentation.

 • Coordinate meetings, reporting, and other lightweight activities that keep delivery running smoothly.



We’re Looking For Someone Who Has:

 • Four-plus years of outbound B2B sales management experience, as a leader or coach.

 • Strong operational discipline: you like metrics, routines, and making performance visible.

 • Confidence running multiple workstreams without dropping details.

 • A founder-friendly mindset: proactive, structured, reliable, and comfortable with fast shifts.

 

This is a full-time, remote role. Your work hours will need to overlap with 9am to 4pm US Eastern Time. 

We rely heavily on Apple devices, applications, and services. You should have a post-2021 Mac for this job.

title: Process Support Executive
description:
APPLICANTS WITHOUT RELEVANT EXPERIENCE WILL NOT BE ANSWERED!!! IMPORTANT: WE ARE ONLY CONSIDERING APPLICANTS WHO HAVE WORKED DIRECTLY WITH FIELD-SERVICE OR TRADE-BASED COMPANIES



• HVAC contractors

About the Role

We are hiring a reliable and detail-oriented Process Support Executive to help manage and maintain our internal systems and documentation.



This is a backend operations role focused on keeping workflows structured, paperwork accurate, and processes running smoothly. There may be occasional light customer-facing tasks, but the primary focus is administrative and operational support.

Work Arrangement
